array.string: cd "__REPO_ROOT__" && source .venv/bin/activate && export CELERY_ENABLED=true WORKFLOW_V2_ENABLED=true WORKFLOW_V2_EXECUTE_M2=true CELERY_BEAT_DISPATCH_ENABLED=false CELERY_BEAT_HEARTBEAT_ENABLED=false CELERY_GENERATE_FILE_ENABLED=true CELERY_GENERATE_FILE_SCAN_ENABLED=true CELERY_GENERATE_FILE_SCAN_INTERVAL_SECONDS=10 CELERY_GENERATE_FILE_WORKSPACE_UUID=ba7eb0ec-e565-447c-8c11-8f870cf72a60 CELERY_GENERATE_FILE_RUN_QUEUE=orch_component_generate_file_run_launchd_local CELERY_GENERATE_FILE_SCAN_QUEUE=orch_component_generate_file_scan_launchd_local && exec celery -A app.core.celery_app:celery_app beat --schedule=/tmp/orch-celerybeat-gf-launchd-local -l INFO
